measured_git_head.subject: refactor(api): canonicalize data source registry exceptions

openapi.command: python scripts/generate_openapi.py --output <absolute-output-file> with dummy env for required startup settings

notes: OpenAPI path count is a snapshot of current router registration and include_in_schema policy.
If output_artifact is null, import/startup failure blocked schema materialization; stdout_tail/stderr_tail is the evidence.
